title: VehicleMonitoringDelivery
description: A real-time data delivery providing current positions and operational states of a set of vehicles.

vehicleActivities.description: List of vehicle activity records in this delivery

validUntil.description: Time until which this delivery data is valid

id.description: Unique identifier for the tracking record

url.description: URL endpoint for real-time tracking information

validity.description: Validity period for this tracking record
